rationale: The proposed change concerns a property tax homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §39.0232 governs use of end-of-course assessment instruments for student placement and admission. The two provisions address unrelated subject matter with no operational intersection.
quote: Sec. 39.0232. USE OF END-OF-COURSE ASSESSMENT INSTRUMENT AS PLACEMENT INSTRUMENT; CERTAIN USES PROHIBITED.
_note: No conflict. The cited education statute addresses student assessment placement and admission criteria; it does not reference property tax, homestead exemptions, or school funding formulas tied to appraised values.
